about.title: Active recreation with "Nemnovo Tour" travel agency!
about.p1: Travel company "Nemnovo Tour" – 11 years of successfully organising water trips, hiking and cycling tours. We help you discover active tourism from a new perspective!
about.p2: "Nemnovo Tour"! Recreation for everyone, experiences for each!

portfolioSection.title: Portfolio
portfolioSection.description: Photos from events and trips. You can download an album using the button.

sup.question: What is SUP?
sup.answer: SUP (Stand Up Paddle) is stand-up paddleboarding — riding a board on the water using a paddle. It's an active water activity: you stand on a wide, stable board and paddle. Suitable for all fitness levels; we teach beginners.

firstTime.question: It's my first time, will I manage?
firstTime.answer: Yes. SUP boards are stable, and our instructor will show you the basics in minutes. Most guests get up on the board on their first ride. We welcome beginners and pick a route to match your level.

fall.question: What if I fall off the SUP?
fall.answer: Falling is normal and not dangerous. You'll wear a life vest, and the water is usually shallow and warm. The board floats — it's easy to climb back on. The instructor is always nearby and will help.

children.question: Can I bring children?
children.answer: Yes. We have kids' SUP boards and safe routes. Please check age requirements when booking. Family trips are one of our most popular formats.
